scripts.pm2:start: npm run ports:free && npx pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.pm2:stop: npx pm2 delete vems-api vems-web 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.pm2:restart: npm run pm2:stop && npm run ports:free && npx pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.pm2:rebuild: npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm run pm2:restart
